mapper.select: select nx_distributer_user_id, nx_DIU_wx_nick_name, nx_DIU_wx_avartra_url, nx_DIU_wx_open_id, nx_DIU_wx_phone, nx_DIU_distributer_id, nx_DIU_admin from nx_distributer_user where nx_distributer_user_id = #{purUserId}

select nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id, nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id, nx_DGSG_shelf_id, nx_DGSG_sort, nx_DGSG_shelf_sort, nx_DGSG_shelf_layer from nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods where nx_DGSG_shelf_id = #{shelfId} order by nx_DGSG_sort asc
mapper.update: update nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods as ndgsg inner join ( select nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT nx_DGSG_shelf_id) >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_duplicate from nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods where nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = #{disGoodsId} group by nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id ) as tmp on tmp.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id set ndgsg.nx_DGSG_is_duplicate = tmp.is_duplicate where ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = #{disGoodsId}
mapper.delete:
delete from nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods where nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id in
#{nxDistributerGoodsShelfGoodsId}
mapper.select: select distinct ndgsg.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_layer, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_is_duplicate, ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id as shelf_nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id, ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_name as shelf_nx_distributer_goods_shelf_name from nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods as ndgsg inner join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_stock as ndgss on ndgss.nx_dgss_nx_shelf_goods_id = ndgsg.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf as ndgs on ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id = ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id where ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = #{disGoodsId} and CAST(ndgss.nx_dgss_rest_weight AS DECIMAL(10,2)) > 0 and ndgss.nx_dgss_status = 0 order by ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_sort

select distinct ndgsg.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_layer, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_is_duplicate, ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id as shelf_nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id, ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_name as shelf_nx_distributer_goods_shelf_name from nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods as ndgsg left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf as ndgs on ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id = ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id where ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = #{disGoodsId} and ndgsg.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id != #{currentShelfGoodsId} order by ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_sort
